prompt: A high-end fashion editorial poster in a vertical 9:16 format, set inside a serene futuristic circular gallery with smooth beige stone walls, a large round skylight in the ceiling, soft diffused warm lighting, and a sculptural circular platform at the center. The image shows 7 versions of the same young East Asian woman with long dark wavy hair, each styled as a different personality archetype, arranged around the circular platform in an elegant symmetrical composition. The central and largest figure sits on the edge of the platform facing forward, wearing a loose ivory-white button-front blouse and matching relaxed trousers, calm and introspective, becoming the visual anchor. Around her are 6 alternate style personas: 1 woman on the left in a soft cream dress with hair in a bun, gentle and approachable; 1 woman at the back center standing in a sleeveless black tailored outfit, cool and rational; 1 woman on the upper right seated in a light beige cardigan and pale skirt or trousers, casual and relaxed; 1 woman on the lower left in a sharp black blazer and dark outfit, urban minimalist; 1 woman on the lower right in a taupe oversized suit, mature and confident; 1 woman at the bottom front crouching in a cozy cream knit and loose light pants, everyday comfort style. All seven figures have the same identity but different styling, mood, and pose. Use a muted neutral palette of ivory, cream, taupe, beige, stone gray, and black, with soft atmospheric haze, cinematic depth, luxury magazine aesthetics, minimalism, and polished skin. Add elegant Chinese typography integrated into the composition: top headline 你不只有一种样子 with smaller English subtitle Explore your style spectrum. Place 6 Chinese style labels with short descriptive taglines near the surrounding personas: 温柔氛围, 清冷知性, 松弛韩系, 都市极简, 轻熟气场, 日常休闲. At the bottom add the Chinese call-to-action 你最想成为哪一个？ and smaller line 评论区告诉我. Premium poster design, fashion campaign feel, graceful composition, soft focus, refined and aspirational.
